# Valentin Genest

> Front-end developer with 5 years of experience, based between Paris and Bordeaux. Building accessible, performant, and thoughtful web experiences with Vue.js, Nuxt, TypeScript, and Shopify.

This site is fully agent-ready: every HTML page can be requested as Markdown by sending an `Accept: text/markdown` header.

## Portfolio

- [Portfolio (English)](https://valentingenest.fr/en): Full portfolio in English — about, recent projects, toolkit, certifications.
- [Portfolio (French)](https://valentingenest.fr/fr): Full portfolio in French — about, recent projects, toolkit, certifications.

## Discovery

- [API catalog](https://valentingenest.fr/.well-known/api-catalog): RFC 9727 linkset describing the MCP server.
- [Agent skills index](https://valentingenest.fr/.well-known/agent-skills/index.json): Agent Skills Discovery RFC v0.2.0 index.
- [MCP server card](https://valentingenest.fr/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json): Model Context Protocol server descriptor.
- [Sitemap](https://valentingenest.fr/sitemap.xml): Canonical URLs.
- [robots.txt](https://valentingenest.fr/robots.txt): Crawler rules with Content Signals.

## MCP server

A read-only Model Context Protocol server is available at `https://valentingenest.fr/mcp` (Streamable HTTP / JSON-RPC 2.0). It exposes these tools:

- `get_portfolio_markdown(language?)`: Full portfolio as Markdown (per language).
- `list_skills(language?)`: Technical skills with descriptions.
- `list_recent_projects(language?)`: Recent client projects with attribution and URLs.
- `get_contact_info()`: Email, professional profiles, resume URLs.
- `get_resume_url(language?)`: Direct CV PDF URL per language.

Resources (`portfolio://about/{fr,en}`, `portfolio://skills/{fr,en}`, `portfolio://contact`) and one prompt (`introduce_valentin`) are also exposed.

## Contact

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/valentin-genest/): Professional profile.
- [GitHub](https://github.com/valentingnt): Open source code.
- [Malt](https://www.malt.fr/profile/valentingenest): Freelance hiring profile.

- [English CV (PDF)](https://valentingenest.fr/EN_CV2024_Valentin_Genest.pdf): Detailed resume in English.
- [French CV (PDF)](https://valentingenest.fr/CV2024_Valentin_Genest.pdf): Detailed resume in French.
